title: Raw Refreshing Mediterranean King Prawns Ceviche
description: A fermented and adventurous Mediterranean dish featuring raw king prawns, beurre-monte, and kosher-friendly ingredients, this ceviche is perfect for those looking to try something new and exciting. It combines the freshness of the sea with the richness of Mediterranean flavors.
instructions: Rinse the king prawns under cold water and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, beurre-monte, salt, and black pepper.
Add the king prawns to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the prawns to ferment slightly.
Just before serving, stir in chopped parsley and dill.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Cover the bowl again and refrigerate for an additional 10 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve the ceviche chilled, garnished with additional parsley and dill if desired.
